description: Bank of the Philippine Islands, together with its subsidiaries, provides various financial products and services to retail and corporate clients in the Philippines. The company operates through Consumer Banking, Corporate Banking, and Investment Banking segments. The Consumer Banking segment offers deposits; and consumer lending, such as home mortgages, auto loans, and credit card finance, as well as remittance services to individual and retail markets.
